nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rhopospina
nodes.summary: Rhopospina（Rhopospina）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Blue finch、Band-tailed sierra finch、Carbonated sierra finch。

nodes.name: Band-tailed sierra finch
nodes.summary: Band-tailed sierra finch（Rhopospina alaudina）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Band-tailed sierra finch。

nodes.name: Band-tailed sierra finch
nodes.summary: The band-tailed sierra finch (Rhopospina alaudina) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae and is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Ecuador, and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. Gallery Media related to Rhopospina alaudina at Wikimedia Commons References
